query:
INSERT INTO space_members (space_id, user_id, membership, joined_ts, inviter)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
            ON CONFLICT (space_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET
                membership = EXCLUDED.membership,
                joined_ts = EXCLUDED.joined_ts,
                inviter = EXCLUDED.inviter,
                left_ts = NULL,
                updated_ts = $4
            RETURNING space_id as "space_id!", user_id as "user_id!", membership as "membership!",
                      joined_ts as "joined_ts!", updated_ts as "updated_ts?", left_ts as "left_ts?",
                      inviter as "inviter?"
